# About This Site

This is a test site used for verifying Geoff's build pipeline. It contains a
small collection of pages and blog posts that exercise the core features:
frontmatter parsing, template rendering, and JSON-LD output.

## Contact

If you have questions, reach out to the Geoff project on GitHub.
